files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+import type { FlexBox, FlexBubble, FlexText } from "./types.js";
+
+export function attachFooterText(bubble: FlexBubble, footer: string) {
+  bubble.footer = {
+    type: "box",
+    layout: "vertical",
+    contents: [
+      {
+        type: "text",
+        text: footer,
+        size: "xs",
+        color: "#AAAAAA",
+        wrap: true,
+        align: "center",
+      } as FlexText,
+    ],
+    paddingAll: "lg",
+    backgroundColor: "#FAFAFA",
+  } as FlexBox;
+}
